title: The Creakening
description: Adds creaking variants for all overworld tree types, and allows for creaking spawns no matter the time.
body:
# The Creakening  
This mod adds variants of Creaking (and Creaking Heart) for all overworld tree types.
Creakings will now also spawn no matter the time of day, and hearts will grow on all trees.

You can craft new Creaking Hearts by using Resin Block and the corrosponding log of your choice.

![Image shows Birch, Oak, and Dark Oak Creakings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZaCnF9nd/images/2e0e2b369323cf66c0885f687b8810565ee2a1af.png)

# Requires
- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)
- [Minecraft Java](https://minecraft.net/)

**Please Note:** This mod is likely to be incompatible with some world generation mods/datapacks, as it replaces the vanilla trees.
